description: Shared Renovate preset for B3dmar Astro sites. Groups the whole Astro toolchain into one PR so partial bumps never break a build, and holds majors for a deliberate manual upgrade.

packageRules.description: Bump astro + @astrojs/* together (with astro-og-canvas and self-hosted fontsource fonts) in a single grouped PR.
Hold Astro and adapter MAJOR upgrades for a deliberate manual bump (they are coupled and can break builds).
